About Me
🌟
I'm Ayisha, a BSc IT first-year student with a passion for building things with code. I completed my 12th with Computer Science as my main subject, which sparked my interest in programming and technology. I consider myself a good developer and a strong problem solver, always eager to explore new technologies and grow one project at a time — inspired to dream big and work hard towards it.
